name: jwt-auth
description: Production JWT verification middleware. Reads `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, verifies the token with `@blokjs/jwt-verify` against an HMAC secret (HS256 default) or a JWKS endpoint (asymmetric, production case). On success, stashes the decoded JWT claims at `ctx.state.identity` for downstream middleware/steps to read. On failure, throws GlobalError(401) with a structured body — the trigger emits an actual 401 response. Configuration is sourced from env vars at run time so deploy-time secrets never live in workflow JSON: set JWT_SECRET (HS256, dev/test), JWT_JWKS_URI (RS256/ES256, production), JWT_ISSUER (expected `iss`, recommended), JWT_AUDIENCE (expected `aud`, recommended). When JWT_JWKS_URI is set, it takes precedence over JWT_SECRET. Replace this with `auth-check` only if you need the simpler header-token-equality demo for tests.
